TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pudun ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 36 buwan, 133 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 129 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 4 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Pudun ga Tjaviljaul ru Sapulju. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pudun ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Pudun ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pu*un ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na pu*un ɣa tja*iljaul ru s~ɕapulju. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pu*un ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pu*un ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pudun ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 36 buwan, 133 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 129 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 4 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Pudun ga Tjaviljaul ru Sapulju. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pudun ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Pudun ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pu*un ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na pu*un ɣa tja*iljaul ru s~ɕapulju. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pu*un ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pu*un ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
